# Guard Core Documentation - LLMs.txt
# For LLM Crawlers and AI Assistants
# Documentation Site: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core

## Overview
Guard Core is the framework-agnostic security engine that powers the Guard ecosystem. It provides IP control, rate limiting, penetration detection, security headers, and behavioral analysis through a protocol-based architecture. Framework-specific adapters (fastapi-guard, flaskapi-guard, djapi-guard) consume this library to provide security for their respective frameworks.

## Documentation Structure

### Getting Started
- **Home**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/
- **Installation**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/installation/

### Architecture
- **Overview**: Ecosystem architecture, module map, request lifecycle, design principles
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/architecture/overview/
- **Protocol Layer**: GuardRequest, GuardResponse, GuardResponseFactory, GuardMiddlewareProtocol
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/architecture/protocols/
- **Security Pipeline**: SecurityCheckPipeline, 17 checks in execution order, fail-open/fail-secure
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/architecture/pipeline/
- **Event System**: SecurityEventBus, MetricsCollector, agent integration
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/architecture/events/
- **Dependency Injection**: Context objects, HandlerInitializer, singleton lifecycle
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/architecture/dependency-injection/

### Building Adapters
- **Getting Started**: What an adapter is, minimal structure, what you implement vs what you get
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/getting-started/
- **Implementing GuardRequest**: Protocol definition, framework mapping table, wrapper examples
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/guard-request/
- **Implementing GuardResponse**: Response protocol, factory pattern, header application
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/guard-response/
- **Middleware Integration**: Dispatch pattern, initialization sequence, CORS handling
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/middleware-integration/
- **Decorator System**: RouteConfig, SecurityDecorator, route resolution
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/decorators/
- **Testing Your Adapter**: MockGuardRequest, MockGuardResponse, check testing, integration patterns
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/adapters/testing/

### Engine Internals
- **Security Checks**: SecurityCheck base class, SecurityCheckPipeline, helper functions
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/checks/
- **Check Implementations**: All 17 checks with blocking conditions and configuration
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/check-implementations/
- **IP Management**: IPBanManager, allow/block logic, CIDR support, client IP extraction
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/ip-management/
- **Rate Limiting**: Sliding window algorithm, in-memory vs Redis, Lua scripts
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/rate-limiting/
- **Detection Engine**: PatternCompiler, ContentPreprocessor, SemanticAnalyzer, PerformanceMonitor
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/detection-engine/
- **Cloud Providers**: AWS/GCP/Azure IP range fetching, caching, refresh intervals
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/cloud-providers/
- **Security Headers**: CSP, HSTS, CORS, default headers, nonce generation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/security-headers/
- **Behavioral Rules**: BehaviorTracker, usage/return rules, action types
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/behavioral/
- **Redis Integration**: RedisManager, connection pooling, key namespacing, fault tolerance
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/internals/redis/

### Configuration
- **SecurityConfig Reference**: Every field with type, default, and description
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/configuration/security-config/
- **Detection Tuning**: Sensitivity vs performance tradeoffs, tuning profiles
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/configuration/detection-tuning/
- **Logging**: Log levels, JsonFormatter, custom log files
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/configuration/logging/

### API Reference
- **Protocols**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/protocols/
- **Models**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/models/
- **Handlers**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/handlers/
- **Detection Engine**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/detection-engine/
- **Decorators**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/decorators/
- **Utilities**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/api/utilities/

## Key Technical Details

### Protocol-Based Architecture
Guard Core defines three runtime-checkable protocols that adapters must implement:
- `GuardRequest`: url_path, url_scheme, url_full, method, client_host, headers, query_params, body(), state, scope
- `GuardResponse`: status_code, headers (MutableMapping), body
- `GuardResponseFactory`: create_response(content, status_code), create_redirect_response(url, status_code)

### Security Check Pipeline (17 checks in order)
1. Route configuration extraction
2. Emergency mode
3. HTTPS enforcement
4. Request logging
5. Size/content validation
6. Required headers
7. Authentication
8. Referrer validation
9. Custom validators
10. Time windows
11. Cloud IP refresh
12. IP security (whitelist/blacklist)
13. Cloud provider blocking
14. User agent filtering
15. Rate limiting
16. Suspicious activity detection
17. Custom request checks

### Package Information
- **PyPI**: `pip install guard-core`
- **Import**: `import guard_core`
- **Python**: 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14
- **License**: MIT
- **Repository**: https://github.com/rennf93/guard-core

- **GitHub**: https://github.com/rennf93/guard-core
- **PyPI**: https://pypi.org/project/guard-core/
- **Documentation**: https://rennf93.github.io/guard-core/latest/
